description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named CI that runs on push and pull request events. Use a matrix job that builds on multiple operating systems (ubuntu-16.04, macos-latest, windows-latest) and Python versions (2.7, 3.x), excluding macos-latest and windows-latest with Python 3.x. For each matrix combination, set up Python, check out the repository with submodules, create a directory, run cmake and build, then execute unit tests, C-API tests, and tests.
